title: Adapted Physical Education Specialists
description: Provide individualized physical education instruction or services to children, youth, or adults with exceptional physical needs due to gross motor developmental delays or other impairments.

tasks.text: Adapt instructional techniques to the age and skill levels of students.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Instruct students, using adapted physical education techniques, to improve physical fitness, gross motor skills, perceptual motor skills, or sports and game achievement.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide individual or small groups of students with adapted physical education instruction that meets desired physical needs or goals.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide students positive feedback to encourage them and help them develop an appreciation for physical education.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Establish and maintain standards of behavior to create safe, orderly, and effective environments for learning.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide adapted physical education services to students with intellectual disabilities, autism, traumatic brain injury, orthopedic impairments, or other disabling condition.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assess students' physical progress or needs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Assist in screening or placement of students in adapted physical education programs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Evaluate the motor needs of individual students to determine their need for adapted physical education services.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Collaborate with other educational personnel to provide inclusive activities or programs for children with disabilities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain thorough student records to document attendance, participation, or progress, ensuring confidentiality of all records.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Advise education professionals of students' physical abilities or disabilities and the accommodations required to enhance their school performance.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Communicate behavioral observations and student progress reports to students, parents, teachers, or administrators.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Write or modify individualized education plans (IEPs) for students with intellectual or physical disabilities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Write reports to summarize student performance, social growth, or physical development.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare lesson plans in accordance with individualized education plans (IEPs) and the functional abilities or needs of students.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Attend in-service training, workshops, or meetings to keep abreast of current practices or trends in adapted physical education.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Review adapted physical education programs or practices to ensure compliance with government or other regulations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Request or order physical education equipment, following standard procedures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain inventory of instructional equipment, materials, or aids.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
